english translation text:
AMAAL – E – LAYLATUL RAGHAAIB
The Night of Wishes

Hazrat
Muhammad Mustafa
(SAWS) used to fast on the first Thursday

Between Maghrib & Isha
recite 12 Rak’at namaz in
Six sets of 2 units.
In every Rak’at after
Surah al Hamd recite
3 times Surah al-Qadr &
12 times Surah an Ikhlaas
After completion of  the Namaz, recite the following invocation Seventy times

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ النَّبِيِّ اللأُمِّيِّ وَ عَلَى آلِهِ
english translation text:
O Allah please send
blessings upon Muhammad, the Ummi Prophet, and
upon his Family.

Go into Sujood and
recite the following Seventy times:

arabic text: سُبُّوْحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلاَءِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ
english translation text:
Glorified (is He),
Holy (is He), the Lord of
the angels and the Spirit.
Raise your head from Sujood and recite the following Seventy times:

arabic text: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَتَجَاوَزْ عَمَّا تَعْلَمْ إِنَّكَ اَنْتَ الْعَلِيُّ الأَعْظَمُ
english translation text:
O My Lord: please forgive me, have mercy upon me and overlook my wrongdoings. Surely, You are the Most
High, the Greatest.

Go into Sujood and
recite the following Seventy times:

arabic text: سُبُّوْحٌ قُدُّوسٌ رَبُّ الْمَلاَءِكَةِ وَ الرُّوحِ
english translation text:
Glorified (is He),
Holy (is He), the Lord of
the angels and the Spirit.
